text:
Top 15 AI Proctoring Tools in 2026

Remote exams have become essential across universities, certifications, and recruitment. Traditional proctoring methods struggle with scalability and objectivity, while AI-driven solutions offer automated monitoring, behavioral analytics, and facial recognition.

1. WeCP (We Create Problems) - Full-stack assessment platform combining test delivery with AI monitoring. Features Sherlock AI for real-time detection, flexible proctoring modes (live, AI-only, or hybrid), multi-screen detection, browser lockdown, facial recognition, environment monitoring, and integration capabilities.
2. Sherlock AI - AI proctoring agent designed specifically for interview fraud detection, including AI-assisted cheating and impersonation. Features context-aware monitoring, advanced identity verification, multi-layer environment scanning.
3. Talview - Flexible AI and human proctoring with secure browser lockdown, multi-layered candidate verification, secondary camera support for 360-degree room scans.
4. Proctorio - Fully automated remote proctoring for academic institutions with customizable exam settings, secure exam environment enforcement.
5. Mettl - Combines AI proctoring with extensive assessment suite, flexible proctoring options, identity verification through facial recognition and 3D liveness detection.
6. Examity - AI-powered platform with flexible proctoring modes, multi-factor identity checks including keystroke analysis.
7. Respondus Monitor - AI-driven tool for educational institutions, detects suspicious movements, multiple faces, and unusual sounds.
8. ProctorU - Hybrid approach combining AI monitoring with live proctor oversight.
9. ExamSoft - Assessment platform with AI proctoring, encrypted content, facial recognition.
10. ProctorFree - Fully automated AI-based solution with facial recognition and environmental scans.
11. ProctorExam - Hybrid proctoring combining AI monitoring with live human supervision.
12. Exam.net - Secure online exam platform for schools and universities.
13. SmarterProctoring - Flexible platform offering AI-only, live, or hybrid proctoring.
14. ProctorFree - AI-driven detection without live proctors.
15. Proctortrack - Robust AI-based solution combining AI monitoring with human review.

AI proctoring platforms combine behavior detection, flexible modes, and integrations to transform online exams into strategic assets.
